title: Node REST APIs & Middleware Pipeline
description: Learn to write modular Node/Express backends, handle client HTTP requests, parse query parameters, and architect custom middleware chains.
learningObjectives: Understand the Express middleware pipeline execution flow.

quiz.question: What is the correct middleware parameter signature in Express to identify a global error handler?
What happens if a middleware function does not call next() and does not end the response cycle?
options: A) Express throws a compiling error
B) The request is left hanging, causing client timeout
D) The next route handler is executed immediately
quiz.answer: B) The request is left hanging, causing client timeout
